commands.review_summary:
The PR changes generated config schema assembly so dynamic plugin and channel ids are stored in null-prototype schema property maps with safe own-property writes, and adds regression coverage for object-special ids.

PR surface: Source +53, Tests +52. Total +105 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main assigns dynamic plugin and channel ids into ordinary schema property records, so object-special ids are handled by normal property assignment rather than safe own-property definition. I did not run the regression test because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No repair-lane task is selected because the remaining blocker is contributor-owned real behavior proof plus maintainer acceptance of the compatibility-sensitive map-prototype change.
